title: Venezuelan Fish Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful soup originating from Venezuela, made with fresh fish, vegetables, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Fish (dried and cut into small pieces)
ingredients.notes: Your choice of fish, such as cod or tilapia

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the dried fish and sauté until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, Venezuelan cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Use a slotted spoon to remove the fish pieces and place them on a plate.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup to your desired consistency.
Return the fish pieces to the pot and heat through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
